# How to get paid every month (without WooCommerce)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-22 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 953

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Struggling to earn a steady income from your website or services?

Whether you're offering monthly services or accepting donations,
unpredictable revenue can make it tough to plan ahead or grow
consistently.

It doesn't have to be that way.

This is why I recommend using WP Simple Pay — the lightweight
WordPress plugin that now lets you accept recurring payments for
free.

👉 Download WP Simple Pay on WordPress.org 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Gi_ozmI_H2A6hONEFMzCZWng4OvWMT72y5TC44ENds4 ) 👈

Free WP Simple Pay plugin ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Gi_ozmI_H2A6hONEFMzCZWng4OvWMT72y5TC44ENds4 ) 

With just a few clicks, you can start collecting weekly, monthly,
or yearly payments for things like:

* Ongoing client retainers
* Subscription-based digital products
* Recurring donations from supporters

You don’t need a full ecommerce setup or a complex membership
plugin. WP Simple Pay keeps it simple... just connect Stripe, set
your pricing, and you're ready to go.

If you're looking to create more predictable revenue without
adding technical complexity, this is one of the easiest ways to
get started.

And when your business is ready for more, the premium version 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.Ong9oyt7OOQtJMJ6YF_UkoADIjgsFfA2n-LJaFnm9uQ ) gives you total control with custom
billing schedules, free trials, installment plans, and more.

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
